summary: Non-USD currency handling fix verified successfully. All 11 tests passed. The fix ensures fee tiers are calculated using USD equivalent amounts. Example: $100 AUD correctly converts to ~$70 USD for fee tier selection.
critical_code_review_comments: Non-USD currency handling fix is correctly implemented in both createCryptoPayment and getCurrencyRates
Fee tiers are now calculated based on USD equivalent amounts, not original currency amounts
$100 AUD correctly converts to ~$70 USD for fee tier selection (Tier 1)
$100 EUR correctly converts to ~$118 USD for fee tier selection (Tier 2)
$100 GBP correctly converts to ~$137 USD for fee tier selection (Tier 2)
Company pays fees mode works correctly without exposing fee breakdown
seed_data_creation: Test payment links created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Non-USD currency handling fix verified. Key endpoints tested: POST /api/pay/getCurrencyRates (with AUD, EUR, GBP, CAD sources), POST /api/pay/createPaymentLink (with AUD and EUR currencies). The fix converts base_amount to USD before fee tier calculation. Fee tiers are defined in USD: Tier 1 ($5-$100), Tier 2 ($101-$500), Tier 3 ($501-$1000), Tier 4 ($1001+).

tests_executed.test_03_verify_fee_tier_selection_aud: PASSED - $100 AUD and $70 USD use same fee tier
tests_executed.test_06_verify_fee_tier_boundaries: PASSED - Fee tier boundaries work correctly with USD conversion
tests_executed.test_07_create_payment_link_with_aud: PASSED - Payment link created with AUD currency
tests_executed.test_08_create_payment_link_with_eur: PASSED - Payment link created with EUR currency
tests_executed.test_09_company_pays_fees_mode: PASSED - Company pays fees mode works correctly
tests_executed.test_10_multiple_currency_conversions: PASSED - AUD, EUR, GBP, CAD all convert correctly
tests_executed.test_99_cleanup: PASSED - Test payment links cleaned up

endpoints_tested: POST /api/pay/getCurrencyRates - with AUD, EUR, GBP, CAD, USD sources
POST /api/pay/createPaymentLink - with AUD and EUR currencies

verified_fixes.fix_1_createCryptoPayment_usd_conversion: VERIFIED - Lines 1486-1503 convert base_amount to USD before fee calculation
verified_fixes.fix_2_getCurrencyRates_usd_conversion: VERIFIED - Lines 4367-4382 convert source amount to USD for fee tier selection
verified_fixes.fix_3_fee_tier_selection: VERIFIED - Fee tiers correctly selected based on USD equivalent amounts
